visualizations.title: Square Root & Squaring Relationship
visualizations.description: The mathematical link showing that square root is the inverse operation of squaring.

steps.explanation: The square root of x equals y (principal root).
This is equivalent to saying y multiplied by itself equals x.

visualizations.title: The Area to Side-Length Link
visualizations.description: See how taking the square root of a square's area gives back the length of its side.
